description: Take feminine dressing to a new level with these Cross sandals from puma. The synthetic leather straps gives it an added edge. Team it with dainty skirts and tops for a very chic look. Upper Synthetic leather criss cross straps with a toe separator for durability and comfort Midsole Smooth and glossy footbed for absolute comfort Outsole TPU outsole with branding engraved for greater grip Slight heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth or brush to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
